title: Simplify Mockito method calls
description: Mockito method calls like 'verify', 'when', or 'given' should be written in the simplest form possible. Overly complex or redundant calls reduce test clarity and maintainability. Refactoring these calls improves test readability and reduces the risk of errors.
recommendation: Refactor Mockito 'verify', 'when', or 'given' calls to their simplest form for better test clarity.

checks.message: Simplify Mockito method calls where possible.
